title: Manufacturing Profit Loss Checklist
description: A comprehensive 50-point diagnostic checklist to identify operational waste, hidden downtime, and margin leakage across material, manpower, and machine utilization on your shopfloor.
targetAudience: Plant Heads, COOs, and Finance Directors

title: OEE Calculation Template
description: An interactive, Excel-based tool with standard formulas and charts to log hourly production, track machine downtime reasons, and calculate availability, performance, and quality scores automatically.
targetAudience: Operations Managers, Shift Supervisors, and IE Engineers

title: Value Stream Mapping Guide
description: A step-by-step PDF manual on how to map your factory's current-state material and information flows, identify non-value-adding delay times, and draft a future-state map to compress order-to-dispatch lead times.
targetAudience: Plant Managers, Industrial Engineers, and Operations Leaders
